/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/main_live.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/pcap_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/packet_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/dpi_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/load_balancer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/fast_path.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/connection_tracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/rule_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/sni_extractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/live_capture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/control_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/nfqueue_capture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/dpi_live.dir/src/flow_csv_writer.cpp.o -o dpi_live  -lpcap -lpthread -lnetfilter_queue -lnfnetlink
